heading: United States trustee
label: 307 United States trustee
text: The United States trustee may raise and may appear and be heard on any issue in any case or proceeding under this title but may not file a plan pursuant to .section 1121(c) of this title
notes: Effective DateEffective date and applicability of section dependent upon the judicial district involved, see section 302(d), (e) of , set out as a note under , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.Pub. L. 99–554section 581 of Title 28

Standing and Authority of Bankruptcy Administrator, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–650, title III, § 317(b)104 Stat. 5115Dec. 1, 1990“A bankruptcy administrator may raise and may appear and be heard on any issue in any case under title 11, United States Code, but may not file a plan pursuant to section 1121(c) of such title.”
